lineup_source: Predicted Ghana starting XI (4-3-3), 2026 World Cup group stage

players.name: Benjamin Asare
players.note: Born in Accra, Ghana; first home-based goalkeeper to play for Ghana at a World Cup, parents not documented but assumed Ghanaian.

players.name: Alidu Seidu
players.note: Born and raised in Kumasi, Ghana; parents not individually documented but Ghanaian.

players.name: Jerome Opoku
players.note: Born in Lambeth, London, England, raised by Ghanaian immigrant parents.

players.name: Alexander Djiku
players.note: Born in Montpellier, France, to a Ghanaian father and a Senegalese mother.

players.name: Gideon Mensah
players.note: Born and raised in Accra, Ghana, to Ghanaian parents.

players.name: Thomas Partey
players.note: Born in Krobo Odumase, Ghana, to Ghanaian parents Jacob Partey and Petty.

players.name: Kwasi Sibo
players.note: Born in Wa, Ghana, into a Ghanaian family; younger brother also plays professionally.

players.name: Mohammed Kudus
players.note: Born in Nima, Accra, Ghana, to Ghanaian parents Suleman Idris Kudus and Mariama Suleman.

players.name: Abdul Fatawu Issahaku
players.note: Born in Tamale, Ghana; parents Iddrisu and Hajia Maria are Ghanaian, details otherwise undocumented.

players.name: Jordan Ayew
players.note: Born in France to Ghanaian football great Abedi Pele and Ghanaian mother Maha Ayew (whose own father was Lebanese, a grandparent-level link).

players.name: Antoine Semenyo
players.note: Born in Chelsea, London, England, to Ghanaian parents Larry (Volta Region) and Dela (Ashanti).
